payload.label: oven
payload.short_description: stainless steel oven front with towels
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel oven approximately 0.8 m from the camera; the glass upper door is partially occluded by two white decorative dish towels with printed text, a horizontal handle and lower storage drawer are visible, and the metal surface shows reflections and minor smudges.
